reasoning_summary: The project yields $2k‑$26k net benefit monthly after operating costs. At the best case the $180k implementation cost is recouped in ~7 months, meeting the 12‑month payback target. However, in the worst case payback stretches to 90 months, far beyond the requirement. Approval should be conditional on achieving at least the mid‑range uplift (≈5%+) or other risk mitigations.
key_assumptions: Revenue uplift applies uniformly each month after go-live.
Gross margin remains constant at 40% for incremental revenue.
Monthly operating costs are fixed at $30,000 (infrastructure + maintenance).
Implementation cost is incurred upfront and not amortized.
No additional hidden costs or changes in margin.
